Star of @netflix's "Tidying Up With Marie Kondo."

externalUrls.title: 🌼Join KonMari Club | Cultivate a Spark-Joy Life in 2025

latestIgtvVideos.title: Sparking Joy with Marie Kondo
latestIgtvVideos.caption: I am overwhelmed with gratitude for all the excitement surrounding my new @netflix series. Take a peek at what’s in store – I cannot wait to share it with you! “Sparking Joy with Marie Kondo” premieres August 31, only on Netflix.

latestIgtvVideos.title: Become a certified KonMari Consultant!
latestIgtvVideos.caption: Is tidying your dream job? Become a certified KonMari Consultant to help people tidy their homes using the KonMari Method! Dates for our next Virtual Consultant Certification Courses have been announced. Visit konmari.is/3hsjqKt to learn more.

latestIgtvVideos.title: The KonMari Fold  Menswear
latestIgtvVideos.caption: Master Marie Kondo’s signature KonMari fold! Learn how to fold menswear, including ties, briefs, button-down shirts, pants and thin sweaters.

latestIgtvVideos.title: The KonMari Fold  Intimates
latestIgtvVideos.caption: Master Marie Kondo’s signature KonMari fold! Learn how to fold your intimates, including bras, underwear and briefs.

latestIgtvVideos.title: The KonMari Fold  Basics
latestIgtvVideos.caption: Master Marie Kondo’s signature KonMari fold! Learn how to fold your basic clothing items, including tank tops, t-shirts, long-sleeved t-shirts, thin sweaters, pants and shorts.

latestIgtvVideos.title: Meditate With Me
latestIgtvVideos.caption: Join me in a two-minute meditation!

latestPosts.caption:
Tea is something that I look forward to each day It’s become such an important part of my everyday life, and finding new teas I’ve never tried truly brings me joy! In Paris, I was having so much fun visiting various tea shops Would you all be interested in learning a little more about my tea adventures and recommendations? I visited Conservatoire des Hémisphères this time and decided to bring home a fragrant floral/fruity tea to enjoy! I also bought some spark joy teas from Palais des Thés, including their tea called Paris for you by day✨ I’d also love to hear your tea recommendations as well! I’m always looking for new joy-sparking additions to my daily rituals!

#tea #tearecommendations #dailyritual #selfcare #teatime

It’s World Book Day, a perfect day to share a little more about my book “Letter from Japan”!📖✨️ I share personal stories and experiences as a Japanese person who grew up in Japan on the following themes:

愛でるMederu: To cherish
極めるKiwameru: To perfect
気遣うKizukau: To consider
清めるKiyomeru: To purify
調和させるChouwasaseru: To harmonize
味わうAjiwau: To savor

📌Comment “BOOK” to get the link to get your own copy!

I hope it becomes a joy-sparking read where you dive deeper into Japanese culture and learn something new!

#book #newbook #japan #letterfromjapan #japanesecture

My biggest tidy tip is to always declutter before organizing and storing. You’ll be surprised at how much space you actually have once you let go of what no longer serves you! You can also save by reusing boxes you already own and use them as dividers to organize!
Many of my clients and KonMari Consultants’ clients end up making space for what truly sparks joy after letting go, and that gives them a joy-sparking opportunity to then think about creative storage solutions!✨️

📌Comment LIST and we’ll send you our FREE tidying checklist and articles on tidying up!

London is one of my favorite places to visit, so I’m so honored and excited to be coming back in October!🇬🇧
I can’t wait to make more memories in London and also make a little more time for myself to enjoy the city as well!
📌Comment: “YES” for more information on the following:
Home Life & You Live
In-Person London KonMari Consultant Course

I’d love to hear any recommendations on where to visit in London! I love places with nature, antiques, or tea!❤️

#London #HomeLifeandYou #ProfessionalOrganization #BusinessCertification

Whenever I plan travels with my family, we sit down and envision our most joy-sparking trip and what it could look and feel like! When we pack, we always think back to our ideal vision to make sure what we bring supports our ideal trip✨

📌Comment: “LINK” to read the article for free! I’ll send the link to your DMs❤️

#traveltips #travel #packingtips #konmari #organizationinspo

When you start to understand what items spark joy for you and what your ideal space feels like, you’ll start being able to apply those skills outside of physical objects such as your mind and decision-making❤️

📌Comment “TIDY” to get the link to my free KonMari Tidying Festival Checklist to get started on your tidying journey!

Don’t forget to repost, share, and bookmark this as a gentle reminder on choosing joy!

#konmari #konmarimethod #organization #motivation #motivationalquote

I recently learned that garden week exists! What a lovely opportunity to share these photos I took in the garden at the hotel for our Ise KonMari Japan Retreat a couple weeks ago!❤️We were so blessed with the sun coming out, that we actually decided to scoot into the shade later so we can cool down☀️
Look at some of these books that participants brought to the retreat for me to sign! It always sparks joy seeing how my book has been enjoyed in other countries📗🎋

Stay tuned as I share more joy-sparking photos from the Japan Retreat with you all! We made so many special memories together!

Comment a ❤️ if you have visited Japan before!

#MiePrefecture #IseShima #Mie #Japan #JapanRetreat

I often hear people share that one of the Japanese phrases they are fascinated by is “mottainai”. It sparks so much joy hearing that this Japanese phrase sharing mindfulness on consumption, making sure we waste less, is something people want to learn more about!✨

📌Comment LINK to read our free @konmari.co article: 5 Low-Waste Tips from Marie Kondo🌏

How do you all stay mindful of what you own? I’d like to know your low-waste tips as well!👇

#sustainability #sustainabletips #ecofriendly #japaneseculture

The KonMari Consultant Program is truly so much more than just a 3-day business certification course✨

Here are the top 3 myths about starting your own professional organization business using the KonMari Method after taking the course! I hope it is helpful!

After once again meeting KonMari Consultants in Japan and hearing their stories and seeing them transform lives all around the world, it truly was evident in how special this community is. The amount of support within the community, sharing advice, new learnings, having accountability partners and making new lifelong friends around the world, it made my heart so full!

I am so happy that I made this KonMari Consultant Program, so grateful for the team that helped it evolve into what it is today, and so so incredibly proud of this beautiful community dedicated to sparking joy around the world.

📌Comment: "LINK" and I’ll send over more information about the program, upcoming courses, and a link to register for the London In-Person KonMari Consultant Course and get Home Life & You Live tickets in London!❤️

I hope to welcome you all to a future course!
We have a course in-person in London this coming October!

#businesscertification #professionalorganization #professionalorganizer #smallbhsiness #organization

Here’s a fun tidy challenge for you all! A 15-minute space reset✨15 minutes of dedicated time to tidy can still make a difference in how you feel in the space and it may even motivate you to do a deeper clean!

Are you motivated to tidy up even further using the KonMari Method?
📌Comment “YES” and I’ll send you my free comprehensive tidying checklist to tidy up in category order❤️

#organization #declutter #konmari #organizationinspo #motivation

After spending so many years honing my skills in understanding what sparks joy for me through going through my things and tidying up, I’ve become truly attuned to the things that are joyful and meaningful to me. By prioritizing the things that truly matter to me, for example, making time out of my day to make myself a cup of tea, or something simple like opening the curtains and windows to let in fresh air each morning, allows me to reset and come back to myself! Even as a busy mother of 3 children, I make sure to set aside time to enjoy a cup of tea every day, no matter how busy, as a way of prioritizing myself and allowing myself to slow down❤️
 
Are you interested in what you can incorporate into your self-care?
📌Comment: “CARE” and I’ll share our KonMari article on my self-care routine!

#selfcare #tea #sparkjoy #routine

Tidying is so much more powerful than many think!✨When you face the things you own and cherish the things that support your life and let go of the ones that have already served their purpose, your life becomes lighter and more joyful! You make space for what truly matters in your life.

📌Comment: “TIDY” and I’ll send you my link to download my free KonMari Tidying Festival checklist, and a link to see me in London at the Home Life & You LIVE in October!

#homelifeandyou #london #professionalorganization #ideallife #sparkjoy
